prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda **KF-ZE** 2.0L V6 (60° DOHC 24V) with forged internals (JE Pistons 87.5mm, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race bearings) and a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** fuel injectors for precise AFR control.

Full **Cusco Type-RS** 7-point bolt-in roll cage with integrated **Sparco Pro2000** racing seats and **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses, combined with a **Mazdaspeed** LSD (2.5-way) and **Cusco 2-way adjustable rear sway bar** (22mm) for chassis rigidity and cornering stability.

Custom **HKS Hi-Power** 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with **Burns Stainless** 4-2-1 merge collectors and **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller, paired with a **Mishimoto** aluminum radiator and **Koyorad** GTX front-mount intercooler for optimal heat management.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon Carbon** hood) and **Voltex** Type-3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span) for aggressive stance and downforce.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 17x9 +35 (front) and 17x10 +40 (rear) wheels with **Yokohama Advan A052** 235/40/17 and 265/35/17 tires, paired with **Tein Flex Z** coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) for adjustable ride height and damping.

**Mazdaspeed** OEM+ front lip spoiler (carbon fiber) and **RE Amemiya** side skirts, combined with **VLED** 7R Angel Eyes headlights (3,000K) and **Depo Racing** JDM-spec taillights for a sleeper-to-aggressive transformation.
